prerequisites.value: Improved Unarmed Strike, Nightmare Fist, Intimidate 2 ranks, ability to cast darkness.

description.value:
**Benefit:** By spending a full-round action to cast darkness, you can also make Intimidate checks to demoralize all foes in the spellâs initial area.

**Special:** This feat counts as Dazzling Display for purposes of qualifying for Deadly Stroke and Shatter Defenses.
